channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Here's how a robot massage compares to the real thing
item.description: First, you book an appointment through an app - it's sort of like getting an Uber. You pick a time and place, and it's all confirmed on the spot. A half-hour massage is $60 at the location I visited.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KRON4

item.title: LIST: Top 10 wackiest Florida Man (and Woman) headlines of 2024
item.description: Another year has come and gone, but the wacky antics of Florida residents will live on forever through the internet.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, KRON4

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Abortions are up in the US. It's a complicated picture as women turn to pills, travel
item.description: Even with abortion bans in place in most Republican-controlled states, the number of people obtaining them has grown slightly.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Mulvihill And Kevin S. Vineys, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Top Epstein revelations of 2024: Bill Clinton's wish, the 'list,' secret docs made public
item.description: Despite his death in 2019, the infamous crimes of disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein garnered renewed national scrutiny and made headlines all year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NY correctional officers repeatedly struck handcuffed inmate, picked him up by his neck before he died: video
item.description: Correctional officers at a New York prison repeatedly punched a handcuffed inmate and lifted him by the neck before dropping him, newly released video shows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US teacher jailed in Russia is formally designated as wrongfully detained
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An American schoolteacher arrested in Russia on drug charges more than three years ago has been designated by the U.S. government as wrongfully detained, the State Department said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How to find the winning Mega Millions numbers for Friday, Dec. 27, 2024
item.description: The Mega Millions drawing on Friday night is worth more than $1 billion. Here's how to find the winning numbers.
item.dc:creator: Local 4

item.title: These movies are some of 2025's most anticipated
item.description: With the vast majority of 2024 in the rearview mirror, it's time to start looking at the most anticipated films primed to take the silver screen in 2025. Full of adaptations, sequels, and reboots of beloved properties, viewers will not have difficulty finding something familiar to enjoy.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: VIDEO: Dog, man stranded in rough waters get rescued on Christmas
item.description: A Christmas morning boat trip for a man and his dog turned into a rescue mission after they got stranded in the Pacific Ocean's rough seas.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Climate-friendly electricity sees big battery projects soar again for 2024
item.description: 2024 was another banner year for a source of electricity that is better for people's lungs, better for climate change and may be reaching your home when you turn on the lights or turn up the thermostat — large banks of batteries.
item.dc:creator: ALEXA ST. JOHN and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Brooklyn homeless shelter worker stabbed to death by masked suspect
item.description: A Brooklyn homeless shelter employee was brutally stabbed to death on the premises of a hotel converted to house the homeless, in the Brownsville neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New European retail gig work app trend may influence US market
item.description: Stores such as Urban Outfitters, Lush and Uniqlo are recruiting gig workers in the U.K. to bulk up their stores.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian ministers head to Palm Beach for talks with incoming Trump administration
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Two top Canadian Cabinet ministers are visiting Palm Beach to talk border security and trade with the incoming Donald Trump administration as Trump threatens tariffs on all Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Retailers, chains that announced closures in 2024
item.description: It was another tough year for restaurants and traditional brick-and-mortar retailers. Several national chains announced closures and bankruptcies in 2024 – not to mention the local small businesses that quietly shuttered around the country.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, KTLA 5

item.title: Pregnant woman stabbed 14 times in front of young daughter over bad pizza delivery tip: deputies
item.description: A pizza delivery driver in Florida was arrested for allegedly stabbing a pregnant woman more than a dozen times over a tip amount, according to officials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Powerful thunderstorms rumble across Texas, delaying holiday travel
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Some flights were delayed or canceled in Texas on Thursday after a line of thunderstorms started moving across parts of the state in a system the National Weather Service predicted could bring high winds, hail and possible tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT and Sora are down: Here's what we know
item.description: ChatGPT, the artificial intelligence chatbot developed by OpenAI, is experiencing an outage on Thursday afternoon. According to Downdector.com, thousands of users have reported outages after a surge in reports beginning around 10:20 a.m. PST.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Boy killed in Colorado reservation shooting was in bed when he was hit
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A 7-year-old boy who died in a shooting that left 24 bullet holes in a home on a tribal reservation in Colorado was lying next to his father in bed when he was hit, according to court documents unsealed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ohio corrections officer killed by inmate on Christmas morning
item.description: "The loss of a staff person is difficult, but to lose a family member on Christmas Day at the hands of someone in our custody is a tragedy beyond comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Peyote sacred to Native Americans threatened by psychedelic renaissance and development
item.description: HEBBRONVILLE, Texas (AP) — In this corner of southern Texas, the plump cacti seem to pop out of arid dust and cracked earth, like magic dumplings.
item.dc:creator: DEEPA BHARATH and JESSIE WARDARSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida woman arrested after allegedly breaking in, stabbing person over pizza delivery tip
item.description: Armed with a knife, the suspect began attacking one of the victims, allegedly upset about the tip she received during an earlier delivery, deputies said.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KRON4

item.title: What is known about the Kazakhstan plane crash that killed 38 of the 67 on board
item.description: An Azerbaijani airliner has crashed in Kazakhstan after being diverted, killing 38 of 67 people on board.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: Annabell Whelan woke up Tuesday and frantically checked on her holiday overnight guest — Nowl the snowy owl, who she rescued from the grille of a car the day before.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH FINGERHUT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackpot for Mega Millions over $1 billion after no numbers match on Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: Hang onto those stocking-stuffer lottery tickets. The Mega Millions jackpot has surpassed $1 billion after no ticket matched all six numbers drawn on Christmas Eve. That means the estimated jackpot for Friday's drawing is $1.15 billion, potentially the fifth-largest jackpot in the game's history.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Man faces murder charges in the death of a woman who was lit on fire in New York City subway
item.description: A man is facing murder and arson charges in New York City for allegedly setting a woman on fire inside a subway train and then watching her die after she was engulfed in flames, police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Officer fatally shot in a North Carolina supermarket, suspect in custody, police say
item.description: GREENSBORO, N.C. (AP) — A police officer responding to a report of a man with a gun inside a North Carolina supermarket was fatally shot Monday and a suspect was later taken into custody, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon and Starbucks workers are on strike. Trump might have something to do with it
item.description: Amazon delivery drivers and Starbucks baristas are on strike in a handful of U.S. cities as they seek to exert pressure on the two major companies to recognize them as unionized employees or to meet demands for an inaugural labor contract.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4
